title: Canadian Silky Bake
description: A moist and silky dessert, infused with floral notes, featuring a Canadian twist.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round cake pan with butter.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, combine honey, tofu, maple syrup, and vanilla extract.
Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
